name: markdown

scripts.catene-tbh: cd catene-sotto-la-pietra && pandoc catene-sotto-la-pietra.md -f markdown+implicit_figures -o catene-sotto-la-pietra.html --css blackhack-nordic.css --css blackhack-nordic-twocol.css --standalone
scripts.catene: cd catene-sotto-la-pietra && pandoc catene-sotto-la-pietra.md -o catene-sotto-la-pietra.html --css catene-sotto-la-pietra.css --standalone --metadata=pagetitle:"Catene sotto la pietra"

author: MrBurst
description: Example of HTML generation from Markdown using Pandoc. Serving the generated HTML with Express.js.
